prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约4285→4895→5227→5657→5846，呈持续后移趋势，近5年累计后移约1561名，年均后移约390名；2025年基准约5846名，后移速度略有放缓；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为365、364、374、356、361人，基本稳定在360人左右；2026年计划314人，较2025年缩招约13%，招生人数明显减少，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第20名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第20–22名区间，学校综合实力处于全国顶尖梯队；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学校管理回应与师德师风相关事件，但关注度有限；抖音综合热度排名第66位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共20个学科，其中化学工程与技术、管理科学与工程获评A+，仪器科学与技术、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、土木工程、建筑学、水利工程等获评A，工科实力突出；招生专业覆盖电气信息类、智能与计算类、精仪与光电信息类、集成电路类等，与优势学科高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会关注度与报考意愿强烈；本省物理类考生2025年约363040人，2026年估算约364660人，考生规模基本持平、略有增加；省控线（物理类本科批）从2021年412分持续上升至2025年459分，反映整体竞争强度加大；天津大学位于天津市，与河北省毗邻，地理位置对河北考生具有天然吸引力；该校在河北省招生占比约3%（2025年18人/全国约600人），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类计划缩招约13%（位次数字减小方向）、本省考生规模略有增加（位次数字增大方向）、省控线上行、工科优势学科与热门专业高度契合等因素，缩招效应与竞争加剧因素相互抵消后预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约5419名，区间4919–5919名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 4285 → 4895 → 5227 → 5657 → 5846, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1561 places over the past 5 years, averaging about 390 places per year; the 2025 baseline is about 5846 places, with a slight slowdown in the backward shift; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 365, 364, 374, 356, and 361 respectively, basically stable at around 360; the 2026 plan is 314, a reduction of about 13% compared to 2025, with a significant decrease in enrollment numbers, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 20th (Top20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 20–22 range in recent years, placing the university in the top tier nationally; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but with limited attention; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 66th, rated as average, with moderate short video platform exposure, no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering rated A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Architecture, and Water Conservancy Engineering rated A, highlighting strong engineering strength; enrollment majors cover Electrical and Information, Intelligence and Computing, Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information, and Integrated Circuits, highly matching the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with strong social attention and application willingness; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates in 2025 is about 363,040, and estimated to be about 364,660 in 2026, with the candidate pool basically flat and slightly increasing; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) has risen continuously from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, reflecting increased overall competition intensity; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Hebei Province, with natural geographical appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 3% (18 people in 2025 / about 600 nationwide), at a medium-low level, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the reduction of about 13% in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (direction of decreasing ranking number), a slight increase in the provincial candidate pool (direction of increasing ranking number), the upward trend of the provincial control line, and the high alignment of advantageous engineering disciplines with popular majors, the reduction effect and competition intensification factors offset each other, resulting in a slight backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5419, with a range of 4919–5919.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Pilot Class (National Characteristic Demonstration Software College Intelligence and Computing)
- Engineering Pilot Class (National Demonstration Microelectronics College Integrated Circuits)
- Engineering Pilot Class (National Future Technology College) (Choose from Embodied Intelligence/Artificial Intelligence/Flexible Electronics/Brain-Computer Interface/Integrated Circuits).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Electrical Information)
- Engineering Pilot Class (National Pilot College Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Jointly with Nankai University).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Pilot Class (National New Engineering Education Innovation Center) (Choose from 14 College-Level Master Classes)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Construction) (2025 data reference).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 4919–5919, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 4919), focus on top popular majors like Intelligence and Computing, and Integrated Circuits; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (about 5200–5600), focus on Electrical Information and Precision Instrument and Optoelectronic Information; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (above 5800), it is recommended to prioritize large-class training platforms like the New Engineering Innovation Center, and flexibly adjust using the major transfer policy.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 578 → 649 → 841 → 1714 → 1976, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2024 with a jump of about 873 places, and in 2025 continuing to move back by about 262 places; the baseline in 2025 is about 1976, with a cumulative backward movement of about 1135 places in the last two years; the provincial History Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 4, 5, 5, 18, and 14 students respectively, with a significant increase to 18 in 2024 and a slight decrease to 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 66 students, a substantial expansion of about 371% compared to 2025, with a surge in enrollment numbers, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 20th (Top 20) in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 20–22 range in recent years, placing the university in the top tier nationally; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving school management responses and teacher ethics incidents, but with limited attention; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 66th, with an average evaluation, moderate exposure on short video platforms, and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Architecture A, Urban and Rural Planning A, and Landscape Architecture A-, which directly correspond to the Architecture category in History Category enrollment; although majors like Law, Chinese Language and Literature, English, and Education are not A-class disciplines at this university, they remain competitive due to the 985 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is hot (recommended), Teacher Training/Education is divided and wait-and-see; the number of History Category candidates in this province in 2025 is about 243,714, estimated at about 245,140 in 2026, with basically stable candidate numbers; the provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) fluctuated from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, indicating increased overall competition intensity; Tianjin University is located in Tianjin City, adjacent to Hebei Province, with natural geographical appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province for History Category is very small (only 14 in 2025), but will significantly increase after the substantial expansion to 66 in 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the substantial expansion of about 371% in the 2026 History Category plan, the basically stable number of candidates in this province, the upward trend of the provincial control line, and the medium-to-high social popularity of History Category enrollment majors (Law, Social Sciences Experimental Class, Architecture Category), it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly move forward (competition slightly eases) from 6379, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 6329, and a range of 5829–6829.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (with 'International Rule of Law Experimental Class' dual bachelor's degree program)
- Architecture Category (Future Smart Human Settlement Excellence Talent Program) (including Landscape Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Architecture (5-year), Smart Architecture and Construction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Sciences Experimental Class (New Liberal Arts and New Engineering Integration Innovation Class) (including Chinese Language and Literature, English, Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other History Category enrollment majors (only the above 3 enrollment directions in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5829–6829, with only 3 enrollment directions in History Category, it is recommended to use the Social Sciences Experimental Class as the main safety choice, and aim for Law or Architecture Category based on personal interest. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 5829), you can focus on aiming for Law (International Rule of Law direction) or Architecture Category (Smart Human Settlement direction); if your ranking is in the middle of the range (about 6100–6500), it is recommended to prioritize the Social Sciences Experimental Class, using the major分流 and transfer policies to flexibly choose; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (above 6700), careful evaluation is needed, and it is recommended to combine with other university choices.
